title: Rank archetypes — Bronze (Beginner) → Challenger (Undefeated)
html:
Companion to the Sept-9 tier-reward screenshot — narrative archetypes per rank (Bronze=Beginner, Iron=Disciplined, Gold=Expert, Platinum=Elite, Diamond=Hero, Master=Alchemist, Top-100=Pantheon, Challenger=Undefeated). Reference for naming the brotein / outpace leaderboard tiers.

brotein · outpace · tier progression design · gaming loops
